blocked_reason: No installed 2-3B local clerk passed the unchanged R15 qualification and admission gates; eleven real Ollama candidate runs, including every installed 2-3B candidate, all failed at least one gate, so controlled benchmark execution would not represent an admitted GAGOS configuration.
evidence: The 30-task fixture set is versioned at docs/r15/benchmark_tasks.jsonl and contains three tasks in each of ten categories. No task was executed and no completion, pass-rate, or cohort comparison claim is made while the local clerk admission set is empty.
